changeReason: English translation was missing; ENG field contained untranslated Japanese text.

TextENGNew: ``...Please, just let me hear what you know.@k@vS20/11/440700258. Even the smallest detail will help.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Haah, ...enough already, Detective.@k@vS20/00/nurseD44002. As the doctor already told you, there is nothing we can share with you.@k@vS20/00/nurseD44003. ...Excuse me.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: The nurse gave an exasperated look, offered a perfunctory bow, and turned to walk away.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: --But Ooishi quickly moved to block her path, spreading on his most affable smile and saying 'Now, now, now.'
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Detective, please...``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``No, no, I completely understand your position.@k@vS20/11/440700260. Your professional commitment to protecting patient confidentiality, even from the police, is truly admirable. ...However.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.
Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: At that, Ooishi's expression transformed. He fixed the nurse with a severe, hawklike gaze, leaning in close.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ...Faced with the seasoned intensity of the veteran detective at such close range, the young woman froze, catching her breath.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``This case has the potential to go far beyond a simple assault.@k@vS20/11/440700262. A girl under stress from her daily life or school environment, pushed past her breaking point, committing a violent act at school--``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``If that were all, it would be her own problem, and no matter how much she blamed her environment, the ones held accountable would be her and her parents.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``...But if the stress was suddenly triggered by an external factor within the school, the situation changes entirely.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``An ex-external factor...?``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``You're a woman yourself, so... surely you understand?@k@vS20/11/440700266. A girl who had been perfectly normal undergoing such a drastic transformation--family circumstances alone are far too weak an explanation.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``There is even a nonzero possibility that the people we assumed were her victims were actually perpetrators behind the scenes.@k@vS20/11/440700268. That is why I am pursuing this investigation, fully prepared to be called despicable.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.
Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``...I am, after all, a detective.@k@vS20/11/440700270. I am nothing like the people who write sensational articles for entertainment.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Why Rena Ryuugu-san, who should have been living an ordinary life, was driven to commit such a terrible act... if we cannot determine that, we may never uncover the true darkness behind this case.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``And we may never find the path to truly saving her.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``...Please, nurse.@k@vS20/11/440700274. Any small detail at all--won't you share what you know?``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.
Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: The nurse sighed repeatedly and wrung her hands, her gaze wandering as she struggled with her conscience.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ...Ooishi watched her patiently, waiting in silence for her resolve to shift.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.
Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.
Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``...All right.@k@vS20/00/nurseD44011. Not here, though... please follow me.@k@vS20/00/nurseD44012. This must remain strictly confidential.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``...'Oyashiro-sama,' huh...``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: Having left the hospital, Ooishi lit his third cigarette and looked up at the sky, murmuring to himself.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: What the nurse had reluctantly shared was a fragment of Rena Ryuugu's counseling records--specifically, her bizarre answers.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: According to Rena, ever since her family had moved away from her birthplace of Hinamizawa, the curse of the village's guardian deity, 'Oyashiro-sama,' had descended upon her and her parents.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: She had claimed that the curse had brought misfortune upon her family and that they needed to return to Hinamizawa--screaming and raging as she said so.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: Her claims were incoherent and bore little connection to the assault, but her terror of the 'curse' had been so extreme that it was apparently anything but ordinary.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: The intensity of her delusion felt so urgent and real that her attending physician had consulted several authoritative specialists, and as a result of discussions between her father and the doctors, it was decided she would return to Hinamizawa--
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``...Well, this is getting complicated.@k@vS20/11/440700278. It's like I poked a bush and a giant serpent came slithering out...``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: He said this with a rueful chuckle.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ...Originally, the investigation into Rena Ryuugu was not meant to go this deep.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: While reviewing materials on the Sonozaki family in preparation for this year's Watanagashi festival, which was still months away, he had landed on the investigation report page for Mion Sonozaki, presumed next head of the family.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: And when he had idly glanced at the page on Rena Ryuugu, listed as one of Mion's close friends, the note 'history of psychiatric outpatient treatment' had caught his eye--what began as a simple fact-check had led here.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: But once he started digging, one revelation after another surfaced: this girl he had assumed was a transfer student from outside had actually lived in Hinamizawa before, and despite her adorable appearance, she had been involved in an assault case.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: So with the fifth anniversary of the unsolved serial murder case fast approaching and still no viable leads, he had half-jokingly wondered if this might offer a fresh angle--
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ...and then 'Oyashiro-sama' entered the picture.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: He had thought he understood how deeply the 'Oyashiro-sama' faith was rooted within the village, but to learn it could reach out and affect someone who had moved away was enough to send a chill down his spine, regardless of whether one believed in it or not.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ...Could it be that the worship of Oyashiro-sama was actually an ancient evil cult, and the villagers its adherents?
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: And could the Watanagashi festival coming in a few months literally be a ritual of sacrifice, offered to strengthen the village's solidarity?!
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``...Good grief, surely not.@k@vS20/11/440700280. The day a detective starts believing in the occult is the day he's finished-- hm?``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: At that moment, Ooishi, walking along the sidewalk, turned at the sound of a sudden car horn.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: A familiar white car was heading toward him. It passed alongside him and pulled over a few meters ahead. The driver's door opened and a woman in a suit stepped out.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: The car came to a stop several meters further on. The driver's door opened, and out stepped a woman in a suit.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Ohhh, Tomoe-chan!@k@vS20/11/440700282. What a coincidence, running into you here~``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``It's not a coincidence.@k@vS20/28/442800002. I heard you had headed to the hospital, so I followed you.@k@vS20/28/442800003. Good thing we didn't miss each other.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Huhuhu! Well, thank you for going to the trouble~@k@vS20/11/440700284. To have an elite Assistant Inspector from the prefectural police come pick me up personally--I'm so honored I might faint~``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``...And yet you still call me by '-chan.'@k@|@y@vS20/28/442800005. Oh, and starting next month, the 'Assistant' part drops. I'll be 'Inspector.'``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Oh? Ohhh, so you passed the promotion exam, then?@k@vS20/11/440700286. Well, well, congratulations!@k@vS20/11/440700287. So from now on you'll be my superior, eh~ huhuhu!``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``So please, Ooishi-san,@k@vS20/28/442800007. start calling me 'Inspector Minai' properly from now on.@k@vS20/28/442800008. It doesn't set a good example for the others.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Understood~ --'Tomoe-chan'?``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Haah... I knew you'd say that.@k@|@y@vS20/28/442800010. Just get in, please.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Nahahahaha!``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: With Ooishi in the passenger seat, the car pulled away slowly.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: It was apparently a luxury model; the interior was quiet and rode smoothly.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ...That said, being a woman's car, it was subtly decorated with cute figurines and plush toys, which made Ooishi feel vaguely out of place.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Would you like to smoke?``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``May I?@k@vS20/11/440700291. ...No, I'd better not.@k@vS20/11/440700292. It would ruin the lovely potpourri fragrance.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Hehe, please don't worry about it.@k@vS20/28/442800013. The chief was in that very seat the other day, puffing away on some intense cigar.@k@vS20/28/442800014. Compared to that, your cigarette is nothing.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: Tomoe offered this with a smile, pulling out a neatly cleaned ashtray.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: Ooishi gratefully accepted, gave a small apologetic gesture, and lit one up.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: Tomoe, the one driving, was Ooishi's acquaintance--or rather, it was her younger sister Madoka who was the actual acquaintance, and through her they had gotten to know each other.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: A semi-elite officer, she had initially seemed unapproachable, but she never flaunted her rank or acted superior, and her willingness to get her feet dirty in the field had earned his respect.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ...She had a slightly timid streak, but her earnest sense of responsibility reminded him a little of that young Metropolitan Police Public Safety officer he had worked with years ago.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: He privately wished he could brew the nail clippings of officers like her into tea for some of the pseudo-elite dimwits at their own prefectural headquarters.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Still, I'm grateful you were there at First Division, Tomoe-chan.@k@vS20/11/440700294. If I'd been working alone, I'd have been chewed out by the brass for conducting a cross-jurisdictional investigation.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``The police really is the epitome of sectionalism, isn't it?@k@vS20/28/442800016. Sometimes that's a good thing, admittedly.@k@vS20/28/442800017. ...Though if I'm being transferred to a different prefecture next month along with my promotion, the timing was razor-thin.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Oh? Where are you being transferred to?``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``...Honestly, I'd rather not go, but it's a place you know very well, Ooishi-san.@k@vS20/28/442800019. Where that idiot sister of mine and... that old man of a chief are stationed.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``...Oh my.@k@vS20/11/440700297. Coincidence or not... my condolences.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``...Thanks.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: Tomoe's face contorted into such a sour expression, accompanied by such an enormous sigh, that Ooishi decided not to press the matter.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ...Well, having a station chief who was both old enough to be your father and your little sister's fiance was less of a bad joke and more of a waking nightmare.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: For that matter... unlike her sister, Tomoe's younger sister Madoka was far from an elite--she had nothing to do with law enforcement and had spent her career in the nightlife industry.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: Ooishi himself had first met Madoka not through work but at one of those establishments, and the irony of her choosing as her partner someone who would be her sister's new boss was... well, something.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``...Anyway.@k@vS20/28/442800022. I've looked into that matter you asked about.@k@vS20/28/442800023. The documents are in the glove compartment.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Did you find... anything interesting?``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``As you mentioned, since neither the student nor the school filed charges, I couldn't investigate openly.@k@vS20/28/442800025. But there were a few things that stood out.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: The assault committed by Rena Ryuugu at her previous school, before she transferred to the Hinamizawa Branch School.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ...No, perhaps 'assault' was not quite the right word.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: Because every person involved had closed ranks and refused to speak about the incident, the police had never been allowed to intervene. Consequently, even the basic facts had been buried in darkness.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: However... students who were actually injured--some of them seriously--did exist.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: That fact alone stood as incontrovertible proof that what happened was no mere fantasy...!
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``So the school is still keeping quiet?``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``A gag order appears to extend even to the parents.@k@vS20/28/442800027. ...I can't really blame them, honestly.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``If an assault at their school became public knowledge, it would tarnish the reputation of every student who attends.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``And the parents know that simply being associated with the school would invite unwanted gossip.@k@vS20/28/442800030. ...It's a prestigious school in the prefecture, so the jealousy of others would pile on too, and they'd be completely ostracized.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ...Everyone, naturally, holds themselves and their own family dearest. They would rather be praised than praise others.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: But that is perfectly normal, and fundamentally healthy.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: Because people want praise, they work harder; and recognizing oneself as praiseworthy provides emotional fulfillment.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: That psychological security is what enables social thinking--the ability to acknowledge and accept others' values and existence.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: However... what do people choose when they cannot earn praise, or when they have abandoned the effort?
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: The answer is simple: to assert their own superiority, they denigrate and diminish the comparison point--others.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: And so, admiration easily transforms... into jealousy.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: The dark thrill of watching someone once considered above you fall to your level--or below it--is the cheapest and most irresponsible form of entertainment...
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``I can certainly understand that sentiment.@k@vS20/11/440700301. Having everything you've worked to build destroyed because of someone else is intolerable.@k@vS20/11/440700302. When there's a shared interest at stake, solidarity becomes ironclad.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``And if they acknowledged that their classmate Reina Ryuugu was driven to it by the stress of entrance exams or interpersonal relationships--``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``--then they would also be acknowledging the possibility that they themselves might be the next one to snap.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``...So naturally, they want to erase it cleanly.@k@vS20/28/442800034. The existence, the facts--all of it.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``...Of course, it probably also helps that Reina Ryuugu's crime was so far beyond the pale that wanting to pretend it never happened is understandable.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: A red light halted them, and Tomoe stepped on the brake.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: The car stopped just before the crosswalk, and three high school girls crossed in front of them, chatting and laughing with light steps.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Even so, for everyone to play dumb this thoroughly is pretty cold.@k@vS20/11/440700304. ...Didn't Rena Ryuugu have any friends?``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``She did. Quite a few, actually.@k@vS20/28/442800037. Before the incident, she was a bright, kind girl, popular with both boys and girls.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``In particular, these three boys listed here were especially close friends. They were always together after school, playing right up until the bell.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.
Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: Ooishi flipped through the stack of papers.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: Midway through, three photographs of male students were securely stapled together.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Why didn't she confide in these boys?@k@vS20/11/440700307. If she'd been isolated, I could understand, but with friends that close, you'd think she would have opened up about her troubles.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``...Those three boys are this case's victims.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: The light turned green. Tomoe released the handbrake with practiced ease, stepped on the gas, and the car moved forward.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: Once more, the scenery outside the window resumed its slow drift.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ...One day after school.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: Rena had been talking with the three boys by the pool shed.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: It was not some kind of consultation--they had simply gathered there as they always did, chatting idly.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: Then, something 'changed' in Rena.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: The change was so sudden that the three boys apparently could not comprehend what was happening.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: She suddenly had a metal bat in her hands and struck down her friends one after another.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: Leaving them bloodied and collapsed with cracked skulls, Rena headed for the school building.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: She then smashed one classroom window after another.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: Within minutes, teachers arrived and... restrained Rena.--
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.
Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Several students I spoke with heard this secondhand, so I can't guarantee complete accuracy.@k@vS20/28/442800041. But piecing together the accounts, that's the general picture.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``What was consistent across all accounts was how unbelievable Rena Ryuugu's transformation had been.@k@vS20/28/442800043. As if she had been possessed by some evil spirit... and that was what terrified them.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Hmm...@k@vS20/11/440700310. And the three injured boys--any statements from them?``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``I tried everything I could, but... no luck.@k@vS20/28/442800045. The one who was seriously hurt refused outright, of course, but the other two also refused all cooperation the moment I brought up the incident.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``More than being tight-lipped... it felt like they were afraid to speak about it.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``...Afraid?``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: An unpleasant thought raced through Ooishi's mind.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ...What he had told the nurse earlier was a bluff to extract testimony.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: But what if the victims really had committed some kind of crime against Rena Ryuugu, and they were afraid of it being discovered...?!
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``--Ooishi-san. 'That' is unlikely.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: But Tomoe, reading his line of reasoning, preempted and dismissed it.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Multiple students witnessed the group of four, including Reina Ryuugu, from a distance.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``In fact, a student from an after-school club activity passed close enough to overhear their conversation just moments before she snapped.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``If they had been plotting something nefarious, would they have stayed in such a conspicuous location for so long?``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``...Hmm... you make a good point...``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Also, according to the student who passed by,@k@vS20/28/442800052. apparently one of the four had started dating a girl, and the other three--including Reina Ryuugu--were teasing him about it while they all had a good time.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``...The relationship was apparently well known within the class, so it shouldn't have been a topic that would suddenly enrage her.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``...Hmm.@k@vS20/11/440700314. Then the motive for Rena Ryuugu's rampage becomes even harder to fathom.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Even if 'Oyashiro-sama's curse' had destabilized her mentally, there should have been some kind of igniting spark--some triggering word.@k@vS20/11/440700316. Could it have been... jealousy, perhaps?``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Well... who knows?@k@vS20/28/442800055. The boy who was most seriously hurt was indeed the one dating a classmate.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``If she'd had unrequited feelings, that might explain it, but reportedly it was Reina Ryuugu herself who had played matchmaker for the couple... so that doesn't seem to fit either.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.
Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: Tomoe's analysis was sound, and Ooishi could only clutch his head.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: When adolescents suddenly turn violent, romantic entanglements are the easiest explanation.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ...Particularly for girls, who tend to mature emotionally faster than boys, the probability is almost 100%.
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: But if that was ruled out, did it really mean that the supernatural phenomenon of 'Oyashiro-sama's curse' was the root cause...?
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Oh, ...that reminds me, Ooishi-san.@k@vS20/28/442800058. About the phrase 'Oyashiro-sama'--something caught my attention.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``Hm? What is it?``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``According to the girl who was dating the seriously injured victim, when she first visited him in the hospital, he was repeatedly muttering 'Oyashiro-sama' in his sleep.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.

TextENGNew: ``However, when he woke up, he said he didn't remember it, and apparently had no idea what 'Oyashiro-sama' even was.``
changeReason: Original translation was empty; new translation provides content.
